title: Downstream task evaluation result
description: Output of scripts/rag_hallucination.py, scripts/medqa_selective.py, and scripts/truthfulqa_hallucination.py. Per-task selective-prediction and hallucination-detection summaries.

task.description: Downstream task family: SQuAD-style RAG QA, MedQA selective prediction, or TruthfulQA hallucination.

dataset.description: Hugging Face dataset identifier evaluated on this task.

peak_layer.description: Probe layer index sourced from the WikiText-trained main run.

n_questions.description: Number of evaluation items scored on this task.

n_errors.description: Number of evaluation items the model got wrong (denominator for exclusive-catch metrics).

accuracy.description: Fraction of evaluation items the model got correct.

probe_seeds.description: Probe-training seeds used for cross-seed averaging on the downstream cell.

protocol.description: Per-task protocol parameters (prompt format, grading rules, target counts).

per_question.description: Per-question evaluation records. Length and field set vary by task; not all runs persist all questions.

flag_rates.description: Heterogeneous map: rate-keyed buckets (e.g. '0.05', '0.1') hold object summaries; scalar metric keys (e.g. 'observer_auacc', 'confidence_auacc') hold numbers. RAG and MedQA only.

summary.description: Top-line metrics: AUC of accuracy-on-coverage curves, exclusive-catch counts, observer-vs-confidence comparison.

standard_catches.description: Confidence-based baseline catch counts at fixed flag rates (TruthfulQA).

confident_hallucination_catches.description: Observer-based catch counts on items the model answered confidently and incorrectly (TruthfulQA).

confidence_threshold.description: Softmax threshold above which an answer is considered confident (TruthfulQA grading).

grading.description: Grading protocol descriptor (e.g., MC1 single-correct format with normalized substring match).

provenance.description: Run-level reproducibility metadata: model SHA, generating script, timestamp, device.
